name: NEKTAR THERAPEUTICS
business: Nektar Therapeutics is a clinical stage, research-based drug discovery biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing innovative medicines in the field of immunotherapy. The company directs its efforts toward creating new immunomodulatory agents that selectively induce, amplify, attenuate or prevent immune responses to achieve desired therapeutic outcomes for autoimmune diseases and cancer.
sellsTo: Patients with autoimmune diseases (e.g., atopic dermatitis, alopecia areata, type 1 diabetes)
Pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies as collaboration partners for drug development and commercialization
namedSuppliers: Contract manufacturers (for biologics and finished drug products)

exposures.sentence: Nektar Therapeutics is a clinical stage, research-based drug discovery biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing innovative medicines in the field of immunotherapy.

catalysts.event: FDA Fast Track designation for rezpegaldesleukin for moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis
catalysts.sentence: On February 11, 2025, we announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) had granted Fast Track designation for rezpegaldesleukin for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients 12 years of age and older with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis whose disease is not adequately controlled with topical prescription therapies or when those therapies are not advisable.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 2b RESOLVE-AA trial for alopecia areata
catalysts.sentence: In March 2024, we initiated a Phase 2b clinical study of rezpegaldesleukin in patients with severe-to-very severe alopecia areata (the Phase 2b RESOLVE-AA trial).

catalysts.event: FDA Fast Track designation for rezpegaldesleukin for severe-to-very severe alopecia areata
catalysts.sentence: On July 29, 2025, we announced that the FDA had granted Fast Track designation for rezpegaldesleukin for the treatment of severe-to-very severe alopecia areata in adult and pediatric patients 12 years of age and older who weigh at least 40 kg.

catalysts.event: Statistically significant data from Phase 2b REZOLVE-AD induction period
catalysts.sentence: On June 24, 2025, we announced statistically significant data from the 16-week induction period of the ongoing Phase 2b REZOLVE-AD trial being conducted in 393 patients.

catalysts.event: Topline results from Phase 2b REZOLVE-AA induction period
catalysts.sentence: On December 16, 2025, we announced topline results from the 36-week induction treatment period of the ongoing Phase 2b REZOLVE-AA study being conducted in 92 patients with severe-to-very-severe alopecia areata.

catalysts.event: Data from maintenance period of Phase 2b REZOLVE-AD
catalysts.sentence: On February 10, 2026, we announced data from the blinded 36-week maintenance period of the Phase 2b REZOLVE-AD trial.

catalysts.event: Amendment to 2020 Purchase and Sale Agreement with HCR to remove royalty cap
catalysts.sentence: On March 4, 2024, Nektar and HCR amended the 2020 Purchase and Sale Agreement to remove the cap on the royalties in exchange for a $15.0 million payment to Nektar.

catalysts.event: Sale of Huntsville manufacturing facility to Gannet BioChem
catalysts.sentence: On December 2, 2024, we completed the sale of the Facility which included the assignment of our manufacturing and supply agreements to Gannet BioChem, an affiliate of Ampersand Management LLC d/b/a Ampersand Capital Partners for consideration of $64.7 million in cash, net of transaction costs, and an approximate 20% equity interest at the time of close in Gannet BioChem.

catalysts.event: Underwritten public offering of common stock (2025 Offering)
catalysts.sentence: On July 2, 2025, pursuant to the April 2025 Shelf Registration Statement, we completed the sale and issuance of 4,893,618 shares of our common stock in an underwritten public offering (the 2025 Offering) at a price of $23.50 per share.

catalysts.event: Underwritten public offering of common stock and pre-funded warrants (2026 Offering)
catalysts.sentence: On February 13, 2026, we completed the sale of and issuance of 7,637,931 shares of common stock at a price of $58.00 per share and 293,103 pre-funded warrants at price of $57.9999 per pre-funded warrant in an underwritten public offering (the 2026 Offering).
